# KAYPHORIA X
> Luxury designer lingerie, couture, and streetwear brand. Founded 2019 by Kayci Chisholm — 2x Met Gala attendee, Vogue Club member, NYFW Creative Director.

KAYPHORIA X designs premium inclusive intimate wear (lingerie), runway couture, statement accessories, and bold streetwear for every body. Collections are featured at New York Fashion Week (NYFW) and LA Fashion Week (LAFW). The brand also develops Aura Wear — an AI-powered personal styling app with Soul Aura energy matching and virtual try-on.

## Key Pages
- [KAYPHORIA X](https://kayphoriax.style): Brand overview, collections, Aura Wear AI styling
- [Shop All](https://kayphoriax.com): Official Shopify store
- [Luxury Lingerie](https://kayphoriax.com/collections/l-i-n-g-e-r-i-e): Inclusive luxury intimate wear
- [Couture Runway](https://kayphoriax.com/collections/runway): NYFW and LAFW runway pieces
- [Accessories](https://kayphoriax.com/collections/a-c-c-e-s-s-o-r-i-e-s): Designer statement pieces
- [KXSS Streetwear](https://kayphoriax.com/collections/kxss): Bold streetwear
- [FAQ](https://kayphoriax.com/pages/faq): Brand FAQ

## About KAYPHORIA X
KAYPHORIA X is a luxury lingerie and couture brand that designs premium inclusive intimate wear, runway couture, and streetwear for every body. The brand was founded by Kayci Chisholm in October 2019 and has shown collections at New York Fashion Week (NYFW) and LA Fashion Week (LAFW).

## About the Founder
Kayci Chisholm is the founder and CEO of KAYPHORIA X. She is a 2x Met Gala attendee, Vogue Club member, and NYFW Creative Director at The Model Experience. She is a SHEIN Collaborating Designer and studied Fashion Business at LIM College and Animal Science at Tuskegee University.

## Products & Collections
- **Luxury Lingerie**: Premium inclusive intimate wear for every body type and identity
- **Couture Runway**: NYFW- and LAFW-featured runway pieces and couture fashion
- **Accessories**: Designer statement accessories to complete a couture look
- **KXSS Streetwear**: Bold streetwear collection

## Aura Wear
Aura Wear is KAYPHORIA X's AI-powered personal styling app. It curates outfit recommendations based on mood and Soul Aura energy. Features include Soul Aura Check-In, virtual try-on, smart closet, and conversational styling. Coming to iOS.
